title: Add focused tests for ICMPv6/UDP malformed packet dropping
description: Extend test/vectors/ with malformed ICMPv6 (bad checksum, short packet, invalid source, bad type) and UDP cases. Add pytest in tests/ or sim tests that verify these are dropped without crashing or leaking to upper layers. Use independent oracles. Cover the new validation paths. Ensure cross-impl with Rust/Zephyr if applicable.
